info.name: QuickBite Complete (Seed + API + Negative)
info.description:
Single unified collection with seed data, happy-path API tests, and negative tests.

=== HOW TO USE ===
1. Create a Postman Environment and select it before running.
2. Run [SEED] folders 1-6 IN ORDER (once on a clean DB) to populate users, profiles, menu items, and orders. Each register/profile request auto-saves IDs to env vars.
3. After seeding, the API and Negative Tests folders can be run individually.

=== SEED CREDENTIALS ===
- Customers (C1-C10): {firstname.lastname}@quickbite.in / Pass@123
- Restaurants (R1-R5): spicegarden | southspice | dragonwok | burgerbox | biryanihouse @quickbite.in / Rest@123
- Delivery Agent: ravi.agent@quickbite.in / Agent@123
- Admin: admin@quickbite.com / Admin@123

=== ASSUMPTIONS (clean DB) ===
- Customer userId 1-10, profileId 1-10
- Restaurant userId 11-15, profileId 1-5
- Delivery Agent userId 16, profileId 1
- Admin userId 17
- Menu item IDs 1-50 (M01-M10=R1, M11-M20=R2, M21-M30=R3, M31-M40=R4, M41-M50=R5)

Base URL: http://localhost:8080

item.name: [SEED] 1. Customers
item.description: 10 Indian customers — register + profile pairs. Saves c{n}_userId and c{n}_profileId env vars.

item.name: [SEED] 2. Restaurants
item.description: 5 restaurants (different cuisines) — register + profile pairs. Saves r{n}_userId and r{n}_profileId env vars.

body.raw:
{
  "userId": {{r1_userId}},
  "restaurantName": "Spice Garden",
  "city": "New Delhi",
  "cuisineType": "North Indian",
  "phone": "9811001001",
  "address": "14 Connaught Place, New Delhi 110001"
}

{
  "userId": {{r2_userId}},
  "restaurantName": "South Spice",
  "city": "Chennai",
  "cuisineType": "South Indian",
  "phone": "9822002002",
  "address": "5 Anna Salai, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600002"
}

item.name: [SEED] 3. Delivery Agent & Admin
item.description: Register Ravi Kumar (delivery agent) and admin. Saves agent_userId, agent_profileId env vars.

item.name: [SEED] 4. Menu Items
item.description: 10 menu items per restaurant — 50 total. Uses r{n}_profileId env var.

item.name: [SEED] 5. Orders
item.description: 15 sample orders. Assumes clean DB: customer profileIds 1-10, menu item IDs 1-50.

Auth - Login
item.description: Login examples for each role. Registration is in [SEED] folders.

item.name: Customer
item.description: GET by id/name/email-phone: CUSTOMER. GET summary/all/delete: ADMIN.

item.name: Restaurant
item.description: Browse: any auth. Get Restaurant Orders: RESTAURANT or ADMIN.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Place: CUSTOMER. Assign/update status: DELIVERY_AGENT or ADMIN. View: all roles. Filter by status: ADMIN.

item.name: QB-16 Update Status - PLACED → CANCELLED (on order 2)
Menu
item.description: Search and browse: any authenticated user. Top 3: ADMIN.

item.name: QB-9 Search by Keyword - Case Insensitive
QB-12 Items Below Max Price (any auth)
Negative Tests
item.description: All error-case tests grouped by domain. Expected HTTP status shown in request name.

item.name: QB-1 Create Profile - User Not Found (404)
QB-10 Get Customer Orders - Not Found (404)
QB-2 Create Profile - User Not Found (404)
QB-3 Add Menu - Restaurant Not Found (404)
QB-5 Create Agent Profile - User Not Found (404)
QB-5 Create Agent Profile - Wrong Role (409)
QB-5 Create Agent Profile - Missing Name (400)
QB-5 Create Agent Profile - Missing Phone (400)
QB-7 Assign Agent - Order Not Found (404)
QB-8 Get Order Detail - Not Found (404)
QB-11 Filter by Status - Missing Param (400)
QB-14 Get Order Total - Not Found (404)
